choose_models_intro: Select which model packages to download now. You can download more later via Tools → Manage models.
skip_core_tooltip: Download only the Core package (recommended minimum).
core_desc: Text detection, inpainting, OCR, pkuseg — minimal to run
check_all_models_tooltip: Check which models have their files downloaded, missing, or with hash mismatch.
check_compatibility_tooltip: Try loading each module to detect missing dependencies or incompatible environment. Can be slow.
download_models_desc: Select the models you want to download. Only modules with a predefined file list are listed.
select_at_least_one_model: Select at least one model to download.
downloading_model_packages_desc: Downloading model packages... This may take several minutes.
no_model_packages_selected_text: Use Tools → Manage models to download individual models, or restart the app to choose packages again.
download_complete_text: Model packages have been downloaded. You can use the pipeline now.
model_download_failed: Model download failed. You can retry from Tools → Retry model downloads.
connectivity_retry_tip: If the connectivity check is slow or fails, set DISABLE_MODEL_SOURCE_CHECK=True and retry. See docs/TROUBLESHOOTING.md.
retry_model_downloads_tooltip: Retry downloading model packages (e.g. after a failed first install).
check_models_menu_tooltip: Check which models are downloaded and download selected models.
release_model_caches_tooltip: Unload detector/OCR/inpainter/translator models and free GPU memory. Use after a batch to reduce RAM.
auto_startup_model_ui_01: Copy model files from an existing local folder into this app\'s data/models directory.
auto_startup_model_ui_04: Do not download any model package now. Use only already-local modules/files.
auto_startup_model_ui_07: First-run local-only mode is active. Use Tools → Manage models to import/download models, or edit config/config.json to enable packages and restart.
auto_startup_model_ui_11: Manually select low-level packages instead of using a preset.
auto_startup_model_ui_14: Model packages have been downloaded. Applied modules:\n
auto_startup_model_ui_18: Some model packages failed. Failed items: {0}
